'''Yenley''' was the [[Prime Minister (Aguarl III)|Prime Minister]] of the planet [[Aguarl 3|Aguarl III]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was scheduled to meet with him and his political cabinet, however the meeting was initially delayed due to the threat of an attack on the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] which forced it to scatter.

{{Char-stub}}
